name: agentguard-vs-cxx
description: AgentGuardVS-CXX workflow controls for Visual Studio C++ AI coding tasks.
author: AgentGuardVS-CXX contributors

interface.shortDescription: Guardrails and audit workflow for Visual Studio C++ agent edits.
interface.longDescription: Runs AgentGuardVS-CXX analyze, verify, and review wrappers so Codex can scope Visual Studio C++ changes, restrict edits to allowed files, run MSBuild verification, and report audit artifacts.
capabilities: Semantic scope analysis for Visual Studio C++ solutions
